title: Cephalorrhynchus kossinskyi
taxonomy: Cephalorrhynchus kossinskyi is a genus of extinct ferns. It is classified within the group Polypodiopsida, specifically within the family Osmundaceae. The classification of Cephalorrhynchus kossinskyi is based on its fossilized fronds, which are similar to those of modern osmundaceous ferns. The fossil record of Cephalorrhynchus kossinskyi has been found in the Russian Far East, dating back to the Early Cretaceous period. Further study of its fossilized remains is needed to confirm its classification with certainty.
